title: bestClip - Fix 3 Video Issues
description: แก้ไขปัญหาวิดีโอ: ไม่มีเสียง, ภาพขาว, ซับไทยล้นจอ

stories.title: Fix placeholder images - create visible colored backgrounds
acceptanceCriteria: Placeholder images have visible colored backgrounds (not solid beige)
Each scene has a distinct visual element (colored shapes/text in English)
Images are 1920x1080 with proper brand colors

stories.title: Fix subtitles - proper Thai line breaking and sizing
acceptanceCriteria: Subtitle lines max 35 chars (hard cap with strict merge)
FontSize 22 with MarginV 60 for proper fit at 1920x1080
Subtitle text does not overflow screen width

stories.title: Fix audio compatibility - ensure voice plays correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Audio sample rate normalized to 44100Hz before rendering
Final video has audible Thai speech (verified with volumedetect)
Audio codec is widely compatible AAC

stories.title: Re-render complete video and verify all 3 fixes
acceptanceCriteria: Video shows colored backgrounds (not white/beige screens)
Subtitles display correctly within screen bounds
